title: Public calendar view
excerpt: I would like to create a calendar view that the public can see without necessarily having a license and can click on the link on the calendar and it will send them to a registration page for that event.

posts.author: tiggr5150 (Leigh Schroyer)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to create a calendar view that the public can see without necessarily having a license and can click on the link on the calendar and it will send them to a registration page for that event.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @tiggr5150!

Firstly, incase you weren’t already aware, you can create a public link of a board view via the share settings:

You then have the option to customise the views name and description. It is in the description that I am wondering you can include the link to register for the event:

Screen Shot 2023-03-07 at 2.00.09 pm894×398 23.2 KB

That being said, this is assuming that registration for each event is through the same link… which might not be the case…

Let me know what you think!
